arts.ttl: Arsenal's six options to replace Gabriel Jesus emerge after Mikel Arteta transfer hint
arts.sum: Arsenal are facing a long period without Gabriel Jesus, who has sustained a serious knee injury, and Mikel Arteta says they will look to sign a new striker in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: 28-year-old “keen to leave Arsenal” and concrete talks have already taken place
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Oleksandr Zinchenko is reportedly a transfer target for Borussia Dortmund and would be open to leaving the Emirates Stadium. The Bundesliga giants have supposedly been interested in the Ukraine international for some time now, and there have been some concrete contacts to explore the possibility of a deal this January. arts.ttl: Bayindir shines as 10-man Man Utd beat Arsenal in Cup thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir shines as a 10-man Manchester United beat Arsenal on penalties in an FA Cup thriller at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man Utd knock out Arsenal with 'five perfect penalties'
arts.sum: Watch the full penalty shootout as Manchester United score "five perfect penalties" to knock out Arsenal of the FA Cup and progress to the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Arsenal can sign three realistic Gabriel Jesus replacements as Mikel Arteta confirms transfer plans
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at three strikers Arsenal could realistically sign during the January transfer window after Gabriel Jesus's suspected ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Arsenal man on Borussia Dortmund’s list after initial summer interest – Discussions taking place
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are looking at a loan deal for Arsenal’s Alexander Zinchenko, with the first discussions taking place between the parties. That’s according to journalist Patrick Berger, who reports that Dortmund already explored the idea of a move in the summer. Arsenal are willing to talk about the Ukrainian but want a firm sale. arts.ttl: Randal Kolo Muani ‘seduced’ by idea of Premier League move as Tottenham push for PSG forward’s signature
arts.sum: Juventus are pushing to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani (26), according to L’Équipe, however, the publication also reports that the France international is “seduced” by the prospect of playing in the Premier…

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney incident triggers Arsenal fans to turn on 'Mr Robot' as Gooners want to veto Celtic transfer
arts.sum: The 27-year-old flashed his brilliance as late replacement against Manchester United

arts.ttl: 'He's fine': Mikel Arteta says £12m Arsenal star will definitely be fit to start against Tottenham now
Borussia Dortmund interested in Arsenal’s Oleksandr Zinchenko to add depth to left-back
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund is interested in Arsenal’s left-back, Oleksandr Zinchenko, as they are looking to add depth to the position. Dortmund are already exploring a deal for the…
